problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of mRNA. mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
